details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are all present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ does not.
reports/board/ directory missing — required governance contract subdirectory. memory_bank/ has docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated directory moltbot/ still exists at repo root with 5 Python modules (board.py, memory_evolution.py, orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, sentinel.py) and agents/ subdirectory. Deprecated board/eod/out/ directory contains old artifacts from 2026-02-12 and 2026-02-13.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs). Affected paths: moltbot/ (5 Python files), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py, .cursor/automations/governance_integrity.yaml, .cursor/automations/governance_integrity.ts, .cursor/automations/README.md, board/eod/out/ (3 JSON files), MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md, alpaca_codebase_payload.txt.
